title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
summary: This week, the newsletter and writing platform announced an integration with the AI writing detection software Pangram that will allow users to scan posts, comments, and replies on Substack’s app to see an estimate of how much of the content was written…
